title: Shikinami Asuka Langley
wikitext:
[]: Shikinami Asuka Langley...? SPOILERS! Post by Shiro » Sat Mar 14, 2009 1:50 pm Promotional advertising reveals that apparently Asuka's name is being changed to Asuka Langley Shikinami...why? There's a Japanese destroyer named "Shikinami." But still...why the hell would they do that? source: http://img10.imageshack.us/img10/7179/shikinamiasukalangleyan.jpg EDIT: Goddamn it, I need to read the 2.0 thread before I make a topic next time.

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sat Mar 14, 2009 2:09 pm It's probably a meaningless, superficial change. Just like all the others in Webuild to date.

[]: Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Mar 14, 2009 2:17 pm I wonder if they plan on introducing more of Asuka's family this time around instead of leaving them as some sort of generally unseen influence.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Mar 14, 2009 2:32 pm Lucretius wrote: It's probably a meaningless, superficial change.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Mar 14, 2009 2:32 pm I support this decision simply to see Asuka fans RAAAAAAGE.

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sat Mar 14, 2009 3:30 pm NAveryW wrote: words

[]: Post by Dartz » Sat Mar 14, 2009 3:53 pm It doesnt sound as good as Sorhyu.... seriously, bullshit aside. It just doesnt sound as good.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Mar 14, 2009 4:18 pm Dartz wrote: It doesnt sound as good as Sorhyu.... seriously, bullshit aside. It just doesnt sound as good.

[]: Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Sat Mar 14, 2009 4:47 pm All will be revealed in due time. Though in my opinion an ill-advised move on their part for the reasons above.

[]: Post by Rommel » Sat Mar 14, 2009 4:55 pm Sorry, no. I'm done with Rebuild. Done. I had hope for it, but this just too much. What's in character's name? Well, what if suddenly it's not Frodo but Billy? Not Harry Potter but Harry Williams? You basically take the soul of a character, who they are in the fan's mind and toss it aside. Just toss it aside. And for what? You don't just change the name of the most popular and iconic characters ever for shits and giggles. And don't give me the usual, idiotic justification that Rebuild is "new." Nobody else has had their name changed, have they? This new thing only apparently applies to things meant to completely destroy Asuka character to the point where now she doesn't even have the name that we've come to know for the last 15 years! Fuck that. I want to be sensible about this, but I can't. There is no reasoning for this, none whatsoever. And no excuse. They wouldn't dare--they wouldn't DARE to change Shinji Ikari's name, or Rei Ayanami's. Anno can rot hell for I care. If I even meet the man I will drop-kick in the face.

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:01 pm Personally i wouldn't mind those change of the Name, The Name on which we rely is still the same as Asuka. But for the new Story ,which simply ahd be changed on the one or other way it might be helpfull to find better implications to understand the role of each character. The want to point out some kind of connection between Rei and Asuka and they add "captain" to Asuka. So that could just underline the fact in how many ways she is or she thinks she is ,is superior to Shinji. And for gods Sake i hope they don't ruin the relationship of Asuka and Shinji. It is one of the most unique relationships i'Ve ever seen ,i doub't anno will simply remove those important stuff ,but of course he has to make it clear in shorter time..and that might be the big Problem for Rebuild.

[]: Post by LIGHTFIRELT » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:03 pm Somebody's real sour.. Well I am to an extent but only cause a genuine reason hasn't turned up yet.

[]: Post by Rommel » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:11 pm I don't really feel sour. Just ... like someone took something I loved and destroyed it. Does that make sense? Maybe it's just the shock, but hell ...

[]: Post by Lucretius » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:25 pm Careful; Reichu might give you a 15,000 word reprimand. ;)

[]: Post by Szmitten » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:27 pm Having been away from Evangelion and fandom for quite a while, coming back to this is pretty cool. To be honest, I want as many changes as possible, what would be the point otherwise? Take the initial concept, go to new places with it. I'm not at all bothered by the name change either, I quite like it actually. It'll be alright darlings.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:28 pm Rommel wrote: I don't really feel sour. Just ... like someone took something I loved and destroyed it. Does that make sense? Maybe it's just the shock, but hell ...

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:51 pm Ramiel² wrote: And for gods Sake i hope they don't ruin the relationship of Asuka and Shinji.

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:57 pm Ramiel² wrote: The want to point out some kind of connection between Rei and Asuka

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Mar 14, 2009 5:59 pm Rommel wrote: Sorry, no. I'm done with Rebuild. Done. I had hope for it, but this just too much. What's in character's name? Well, what if suddenly it's not Frodo but Billy? Not Harry Potter but Harry Williams? You basically take the soul of a character, who they are in the fan's mind and toss it aside. Just toss it aside. And for what? You don't just change the name of the most popular and iconic characters ever for shits and giggles. And don't give me the usual, idiotic justification that Rebuild is "new." Nobody else has had their name changed, have they? This new thing only apparently applies to things meant to completely destroy Asuka character to the point where now she doesn't even have the name that we've come to know for the last 15 years! Fuck that. I want to be sensible about this, but I can't. There is no reasoning for this, none whatsoever. And no excuse. They wouldn't dare--they wouldn't DARE to change Shinji Ikari's name, or Rei Ayanami's. Anno can rot hell for I care. If I even meet the man I will drop-kick in the face.

[]: Post by Legendary » Sat Mar 14, 2009 6:03 pm Uhm, I'm very amused by this "Harry Williams" and "Billy Baggins" nonsense. It isn't the same thing. Equivalents in those fandoms would be "Jane Granger" or "Pippin Underhill." But the nitpicking your analogies aside, Asuka being renamed isn't an issue to me all that much. I don't like the name they gave her, as was said, she's Ayanami's opposite, not her second, but it's not so big a deal, as long as they keep her with the same personality type and she gets a few good Eva fights in. After all, it's the character's struggles that matter, not their names.
